literal_inventory.reason: Loop with computed indices (320 + i*30, 320 - i*25). Per spec rule 8, loop-generated positions with computed expressions stay in code. The formula defines a diagonal stepping-stone pattern; hoisting would require a 8-element array of nearly identical computed points which would be less readable and harder to maintain than the formula.
